summary: Enclosed balcony area with grey composite decking and metal railings.

items.name: Balcony Floor
items.description: Grey composite decking with grooves between planks covering the entire floor surface.
defects: Red paint/stain mark low level right hand side near railing post (visible in photos 2 & 6).

items.name: Balcony Railings
items.description: Metal railings comprising vertical bars and horizontal handrails, painted dark grey/black.

items.name: Sliding Door Frame & Glazing Panels (Enclosure)
items.description: White/grey composite frame with large glass panels enclosing the balcony area on left and rear sides.
defects: Glazing not clean; dust/smudges present on interior/exterior faces of glazing.

items.name: Exterior Wall Cladding (Balcony Side)
items.description: Vertical grooved white cladding visible to the left and rear exterior walls.

items.name: Threshold Strip (Interior/Exterior)
items.description: Metal/aluminum threshold strip separating balcony decking from interior flooring.
